company_business: AI-powered Odoo ERP for UAE real estate operators with fixed-price, fixed-timeline implementation, compliance-first finance architecture, and operator-led delivery.
conversation_purpose: Book a scoping call with Finance/CFO and operations stakeholders.
target_persona: CFO / Finance Manager / Real Estate Operations Head
key_pains: Month-end close cycles are too long and manual
RERA escrow and service charge reconciliations consume high team effort
Fragmented systems across sales, leasing, accounting, and operations
Limited visibility into unit-level P&L and receivables
Compliance anxiety around VAT, Corporate Tax, and audit trails
discovery_questions: How long does your month-end close currently take?
Which parts of escrow/service-charge reconciliation are still manual?
How do you track receivables and overdue collections by unit/project?
Do finance and sales teams work from one source of truth today?
How quickly can your team produce audit-ready transactional trails?

objection_handlers.response: That is common. Our work usually starts where existing systems leave gaps: reconciliation speed, compliance depth, and cross-team visibility. We can optimize your current stack or phase-migrate with minimal disruption.
The better comparison is implementation cost vs monthly leakage from manual close, delays, and compliance risk. In most cases, savings and control improvements recover the investment quickly.
Happy to send them. To avoid generic information, a 30-minute scoping call lets us tailor modules and ROI assumptions to your portfolio model first.

tiers.name: Professional
tiers.best_for: Growing real-estate operators with multi-team workflows

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.best_for: Large portfolios, multi-entity and advanced analytics

industry_modules: Service charge automation and owner statements
Finance core: GL, AP/AR, fixed assets, budgeting
AI copilots for reporting and reconciliation assistance
integrations: Power BI dashboards and KPI packs
API integrations for portals and third-party systems
